RM 608 CHARLENE MITCHELL, JUDGE, CLACY, CLERK, DNEVILLE, CSR CAUSE CALLED FOR CONTESTED COURT TRIAL. RICHARD BECKMAN FOR PLAINTIFF. MARTIN LAVINS FOR DEFENSE IN PRO PER. COURT RENDERS JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF, DETAILS ON CLERK'S MINTUES. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PARTY INTRODUCING THEM.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAVINS, MARTIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2820 SCOTT ST #18 $1,077.84 RENT, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,602.84
